source.title: OpenAI and Google Workers File Amicus Brief in Support of Anthropic Against the US Government
source.summary: WIRED reports on 30+ OpenAI and Google researchers filing an amicus brief supporting Anthropic's Pentagon lawsuit, arguing the supply-chain risk designation threatens U.S. AI competitiveness and chills industry debate on AI safety. The brief highlights that contractual and technological guardrails, in the absence of public law, are vital safeguards against catastrophic AI misuse.
